economic_notes: Nation receives 72% of revenue from Indigenous Services Canada (2022: 75%). Holds minority partnership interests in multiple limited partnerships including Ontario First Nations LP, First Nation LP, Opiikapawiin Holdings, Chi Mino Ozhitoowin LP, and 601 Canarctic LP. Subsequent event: US tariffs and Canadian retaliatory tariffs creating economic uncertainty.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED due to unaudited limited partnership statements (601 Canarctic LP and others) whose earnings cannot be verified. Nation is not in compliance with First Nations Financial Transparency Act as audit report dated June 16, 2025 is after the July 29, 2023 submission deadline. Funding repayable of $825,816 exists. Net OSR is negative because deferred revenue mechanics significantly reduce reported revenue; actual own-source receipts include OFNLP distributions, interest, rent, and miscellaneous. No schedule of remuneration provided. Public Works segment ($223,389) is closest to infrastructure operations expenses.
